title: TRUE Puglia 2026
subtitle: Get Your Feedback
intro: Thank you for attending TRUE Puglia 2026. Your feedback helps us shape future editions and deliver even more meaningful experiences.

questions.text: How would you rate your overall experience at this edition of TRUE Puglia?
Which aspect of the event did you find most valuable for your professional goals?
How would you rate the quality and relevance of the buyers and exhibitors you met during the networking sessions?
How would you rate the quality and relevance of the exhibitors you met during the networking sessions?
Which specific experience or site visit during the program stood out to you the most?
How satisfied were you with the event logistics, including transportation and scheduling?
How would you rate the communication via TRUEapp and the support provided by the TRUE team before and during the event?
Please share your feedback on the quality of the event locations, accommodations and dining experiences selected for this edition.
What was the single most memorable moment of TRUE Puglia for you?
questions.placeholder: Tell us your most memorable moment...

questions.text: Do you have any suggestions or specific feedback to help us make future editions even better?
